---
title: R webinars
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{layout="[5, 5, -5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[GIS mapping<br>with &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"}](wb_gis_mapping.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[An intro to HPC in &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"}](wb_hpc.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
